'''âz-dh-j''' ('''kazadhaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vape|vape]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-dh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vape|vape]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-dh-j
|-
! Lemma
| kazadhaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizadhaj|thizadhaj]] || [[word:jizadhaj|jizadhaj]] || [[word:shizadhaj|shizadhaj]] || [[word:kizadhaj|kizadhaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzadhaj|thuthuzadhaj]] || [[word:jujuzadhaj|jujuzadhaj]] || [[word:shushuzadhaj|shushuzadhaj]] || [[word:kukuzadhaj|kukuzadhaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzadhaj|thuzadhaj]] || [[word:juzadhaj|juzadhaj]] || [[word:shuzadhaj|shuzadhaj]] || [[word:kuzadhaj|kuzadhaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzadhaj|thuzadhaj]] || [[word:juzadhaj|juzadhaj]] || [[word:shuzadhaj|shuzadhaj]] || [[word:kuzadhaj|kuzadhaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezadhaj|thezadhaj]] || [[word:jezadhaj|jezadhaj]] || [[word:shezadhaj|shezadhaj]] || [[word:kezadhaj|kezadhaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozadhaj|thothozadhaj]] || [[word:jojozadhaj|jojozadhaj]] || [[word:shoshozadhaj|shoshozadhaj]] || [[word:kokozadhaj|kokozadhaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozadhaj|thozadhaj]] || [[word:jozadhaj|jozadhaj]] || [[word:shozadhaj|shozadhaj]] || [[word:kozadhaj|kozadhaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozadhaj|thozadhaj]] || [[word:jozadhaj|jozadhaj]] || [[word:shozadhaj|shozadhaj]] || [[word:kozadhaj|kozadhaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzadhaj|thĂŠzadhaj]] || [[word:jĂŠzadhaj|jĂŠzadhaj]] || [[word:shĂŠzadhaj|shĂŠzadhaj]] || [[word:kĂŠzadhaj|kĂŠzadhaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazadhaj|thathazadhaj]] || [[word:jajazadhaj|jajazadhaj]] || [[word:shashazadhaj|shashazadhaj]] || [[word:kakazadhaj|kakazadhaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazadhaj|thazadhaj]] || [[word:jazadhaj|jazadhaj]] || [[word:shazadhaj|shazadhaj]] || [[word:kazadhaj|kazadhaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazadhaj|thazadhaj]] || [[word:jazadhaj|jazadhaj]] || [[word:shazadhaj|shazadhaj]] || [[word:kazadhaj|kazadhaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazadhaj|shazadhaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazadhaj|goshazadhaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazadhaj|gokishazadhaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazadhajnĂŒ|shazadhajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazadhajnknĂŒ|goshazadhajnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazadhajnĂŒ|gokishazadhajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazadhajshĂ«|shazadhajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazadhajnkshĂ«|goshazadhajnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazadhajshĂ«|gokishazadhajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazadhajro|shazadhajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazadhajnkro|goshazadhajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazadhajro|gokishazadhajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazadhajmu|shazadhajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazadhajnkmu|goshazadhajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazadhajmu|gokishazadhajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazadhajsher|shazadhajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazadhajnksher|goshazadhajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazadhajsher|gokishazadhajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazadhajng|shazadhajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazadhajnkng|goshazadhajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazadhajng|gokishazadhajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazadhajya|shazadhajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazadhajnkya|goshazadhajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazadhajya|gokishazadhajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazadhajyam|shazadhajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazadhajnkyam|goshazadhajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazadhajyam|gokishazadhajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazadhajnĂŒshĂ«|shazadhajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazadhajnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazadhajnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazadhajnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazadhajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazadhajnĂŒro|shazadhajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazadhajnknĂŒro|goshazadhajnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazadhajnĂŒro|gokishazadhajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazadhajnĂŒmu|shazadhajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazadhajnknĂŒmu|goshazadhajnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazadhajnĂŒmu|gokishazadhajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazadhajshĂ«nĂŒ|shazadhajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazadhajnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazadhajnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazadhajshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazadhajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazadhajshĂ«ro|shazadhajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazadhajnkshĂ«ro|goshazadhajnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazadhajshĂ«ro|gokishazadhajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazadhajshĂ«mu|shazadhajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazadhajnkshĂ«mu|goshazadhajnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazadhajshĂ«mu|gokishazadhajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazadhajronĂŒ|shazadhajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazadhajnkronĂŒ|goshazadhajnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazadhajronĂŒ|gokishazadhajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazadhajroshĂ«|shazadhajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazadhajnkroshĂ«|goshazadhajnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazadhajroshĂ«|gokishazadhajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazadhajromu|shazadhajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazadhajnkromu|goshazadhajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazadhajromu|gokishazadhajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazadhajmunĂŒ|shazadhajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazadhajnkmunĂŒ|goshazadhajnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazadhajmunĂŒ|gokishazadhajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazadhajmushĂ«|shazadhajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazadhajnkmushĂ«|goshazadhajnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazadhajmushĂ«|gokishazadhajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazadhajmuro|shazadhajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazadhajnkmuro|goshazadhajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazadhajmuro|gokishazadhajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
